blended.narrative: Whitewater is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,257 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.2" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
